articles.title: Mining the Deep Ocean for Valuable Rocks
articles.summary: Deep in the Pacific Ocean, a big machine collected rock nodules full of metals like copper and cobalt in 2022. Companies want to mine these rocks to get minerals needed for clean energy, like for electric cars and solar panels. Some people think mining the ocean floor is a good idea because we might not have enough minerals on land. Others worry it could harm ocean animals and plants, so they want to wait or stop it until we know more. Countries are trying to make rules for this mining, but they haven't agreed yet. Time is running out because mining might start soon without proper rules. Scientists are studying if we really need ocean minerals or if land has enough, and what the environmental effects might be.

articles.title: A Very Old Handprint in a Cave
articles.summary: Scientists found a handprint on a cave wall in Indonesia that is 67,800 years old, making it the oldest art ever discovered. This handprint was made by people who lived long ago, and it helps us learn about how humans first traveled to Australia. The handprint is in a limestone cave on the island of Sulawesi, and researchers used a special dating method to figure out its age. They also found that people kept making art in this cave for thousands of years. The handprint looks a bit like a claw because someone changed its shape after it was made, but we don't know why. This discovery shows that early humans were creative and had a rich culture.

articles.title: Scientists Find New Kind of Friction with Magnets
articles.summary: Scientists at the University of Konstanz have discovered a new type of friction that happens without touching. Friction is the force that makes it hard to slide things, like when you push a heavy box. Usually, friction gets stronger when you press things together harder, which is called Amontons' law. But in this experiment, they used magnets that never touch each other. They found that friction can reach a high peak when the magnets are at a certain distance apart. This happens because the magnets have competing preferences for how to line up, causing them to switch back and forth as they move, which creates energy loss and friction. This shows that friction isn't always about surfaces rubbing; it can come from how magnets behave inside a system.

articles.title: A Hot Planet with a Surprising Blanket of Air
articles.summary: Scientists used a big space telescope called the James Webb Space Telescope to look at a faraway planet named TOI-561 b. This planet is very hot and old, and it is called a super Earth because it is bigger than Earth. It orbits very close to its star, so one side is always bright and hot. People thought such a small, hot planet would lose its air quickly, but the telescope found signs that it has a thick atmosphere, like a blanket of gas around it. This is surprising because in our Solar System, hot small planets usually don't keep their air. The planet also has a lower density, which means it is less heavy than expected, and the atmosphere might help explain this. The telescope measured the temperature and found it cooler than if there was no air, showing heat is being moved around. This discovery helps us learn about planets in other parts of space.

articles.title: A New Pill That Fights Bad Cholesterol
articles.summary: Scientists have tested a new pill called enlicitide that can lower bad cholesterol by 60%. Bad cholesterol, called LDL, can build up in arteries and cause heart attacks or strokes. The pill was given to people in a big study, and it helped reduce their cholesterol levels. This is important because many people with heart disease have high cholesterol, and current medicines like statins or injections are not always enough. The new pill is taken once a day, making it easier for patients. If approved, it could help millions of people stay healthier by preventing heart problems. The study was led by a doctor and sponsored by a drug company, showing it might be a safe and effective option in the future.

articles.title: A New Plan for Nuclear Power in America
articles.summary: This article talks about how the government is changing the rules for nuclear power in America. A young lawyer named Seth Cohen, who works for the Department of Energy, led a meeting at a big lab in Idaho. He said that the Nuclear Regulatory Commission, which makes sure nuclear plants are safe, will do what the government tells it to do. Some people at the meeting were worried about safety, especially for babies and pregnant women, but Cohen did not seem to care much. The Trump administration wants to build more nuclear power plants to help with artificial intelligence, so they are making new rules quickly. Silicon Valley companies, which have a lot of money, are helping with this plan. This is making some experts nervous because they think safety is very important.
